name: vibe-rig
description: Enterprise pre-development orchestration, approval-ready Docs as Code contracts, Linear-native execution, and subagent routing.

interface.shortDescription: Turn one owner request into an approval-ready development plan.
interface.longDescription: VibeRig interviews the owner once, orchestrates product, domain research, architecture, acceptance, testing, risk, and delivery planning internally, then materializes the approved plan into Linear for subagent-routed execution and evidence-based acceptance.
defaultPrompt: Use VibeRig intake to handle this requirement and prepare the complete pre-development approval package
Continue the VibeRig pre-development review for this requirement
Run the next VibeRig Linear task
Record human acceptance for a VibeRig Linear task
